expected_recovered_crates.rationale: Base anchored on the 108,000-crate target (40% of 270,000). Low reflects Risk 7 (incentive fatigue, municipal MoU slippage) reverting recovery toward baseline; high reflects Risk 1 (viral overshoot beyond 1.35M DKK donation cap).

logistics_cost_per_crate_dkk.rationale: Base near the 15 DKK/crate threshold the reviewer flagged as the budget-overrun trigger. Low reflects supermarket-channel efficiency; high reflects Issue 1 stress test of 25 DKK/crate on municipal channel causing 21-42% logistics overrun.

marketing_cost_realized_dkk.rationale: Base at the 1.0M DKK allocation. High reflects Risk 3 stress test of a 500,000 DKK marketing increase if irreverent tone is vetoed and paid media replaces lost organic impressions; low reflects under-spend if virality lands cleanly.
